name: counter
description: Reactive ref — increments a green counter every 100ms.

name: colors
description: Text in every supported foreground and background color.

name: text-styles
description: bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, inverse, dim.

name: flex-layout
description: Box layout — flexDirection, justifyContent, alignItems, gap, padding.

name: spacer
description: Spacer pushes siblings apart; Newline inserts line breaks inside Text.

name: transform
description: Transform component — uppercase, reverse, bracket, line numbering.

name: input
description: useInput / useApp — live keypress display; q or Esc to quit.

name: kitty-keys
description: Kitty keyboard — modifiers, special keys, press/repeat/release event types.

name: paste
description: usePaste — bracketed paste mode; pastes multi-line text as one event.

name: focus
description: useFocus / useFocusManager — Tab cycles 4 buttons; disable/enable, jump-to-id, isActive toggle.

name: window-size
description: useWindowSize — live-reactive terminal columns × rows on resize.

name: task-board
description: Kanban board exercising every component + composable: focus, input, paste, window size, stdout/stderr, transforms, borders.

name: dashboard
description: Ops dashboard — animated sparklines (CPU/mem/net), progress bars, spinner, live log stream. useAnimation showcase.

name: chat
description: Chat REPL with blinking caret (useCursor), typing indicator, slash commands, paste support.

name: test-runner
description: Simulated jest-style runner — completed tests stream into scrollback via <Static>, live progress block stays pinned.

name: snake
description: Real-time snake game — useAnimation game loop, arrow/hjkl/wasd input, pause + restart, score tracking.
